name: tc-cov-full
description: The default coverage fixture shape — the prescribed consumer package layout `{package.json, src/**}`, scanned at `src/`. `src/widget.ts` is fully tested by its colocated `src/widget.test.ts`, so the run clears a 100 floor. The flat, no-manifest shape is the named special case (exempt_cov, full_with_config).
